note: Phase 3 profile FIRED A7 — A7 module produced regression. dict header overhead exceeds saving on this corpus despite multi-schema rows≥16 avg_rps≥4 conditions met. Phase 3 commit claim 'regression eliminated' FALSIFIED on this surface.

Phase 3 profile FIRED A10 — A10 module produced regression. base64url bookkeeping overhead exceeds varint saving on small corpora with rows<20. heuristic gap: A10 needs row_count≥20 OR larger int saving margin to amortize.

identical regression pattern to alm_r13_4gate_pass_subset — corpus_tier_tier1 is structural twin (5 schemas, ~840 rows, similar verbose key names). A7 dict overhead pattern reproducible on multi-schema verbose-key surfaces.
highest A1-only saving in pilot — single-schema text-heavy corpus, A7 correctly skipped (multi-schema gate). example of A1 EXCELLENT efficacy.

4th regression — A10 fired but added bookkeeping bytes > varint saving. Phase 3 heuristic int_ratio≥30% INSUFFICIENT — needs additional gate (e.g. avg_int_value_size≥4 digits to cover varint amortization).
single-schema text-heavy — A1 alone yields strong saving.
multi-schema but rows<16 — Phase 3 correctly skipped A7.
WEAK efficacy — rps=1.0 schema-heterogeneity dominates A1 saving (atlas-class signature).

target_status: NOT_MET — Phase 3 conditional apply has 4/10 regressions; A7+A10 modules WEAKER than Phase 3 commit message claims

gap_a7: profile fires A7 when schema_count≥2 + rows≥16 + avg_rps≥4 — but A7 module dict-header overhead exceeds saving on multi-schema corpora with verbose-key + alphabetic-value mix (alm_r13/corpus_tier_tier1: 22% → 15%). Required additional gate: estimated_dict_size_pct ≤ saving_margin_threshold (e.g. measure A7 expected gain BEFORE applying)
gap_a10: profile fires A10 when int_ratio≥30% + rows≥8 — but base64url bookkeeping exceeds varint saving on small int values (cross_repo_sync 42% → 36%; stimulus_factory 42% → 40%). Required additional gate: row_count≥32 OR avg_int_digits≥4
fix_path_1: add A7/A10 try-and-revert (compute output bytes; if > input revert to identity passthrough — raw 65 + 68 idempotent contract preserved)
fix_path_2: refine profile heuristic with empirical thresholds from this measurement: A7 use if (schema_count≥2 AND rows≥32 AND verbose_key_avg_len≤12 AND avg_value_len≥8); A10 use if (int_ratio≥40% AND rows≥32 AND avg_int_digits≥3)

verdict_a8_a9_a11: REQUIRED — A1+A7+A10 alone (with regression-fix) cannot close 50+pp gap to 80%. Forward spec: A8 column-statistical (per-column entropy coding, expected +10-15pp on integer columns), A9 ai-native-tokenizer (BPE-aware key-name elision, expected +8-12pp uniformly when tokenizer lands), A11 cross-row-delta (timestamp + monotonic counter delta, expected +15-25pp on log-class surfaces with timestamps).
feasibility: A1+A7-fixed+A10-fixed 30%; +A8 40%; +A9 48%; +A11 65-70%; combined ceiling ~70% on heterogeneous; 80% requires structural compression A4 OR semantic-axis A6 retrofit
priority_order: P0 fix A7/A10 regression (try-and-revert); P1 land A11 cross-row-delta (highest ROI on log-class); P2 land A8 column-stat; P3 land A9 tokenizer; P4 land A4/A6 for atlas-class ceiling
